title: Retail inflation climbs to 13-month high of 3.5% in April on higher food, restaurant prices
content:
Retail inflation climbed to a 13-month high of 3.5% in April.
*   This surge was primarily driven by an increase in food prices.
*   Higher costs in restaurants also significantly contributed to the rise.

title: Petroleum Minister does not rule out fuel price hike amidst concerns about mounting OMCs’ losses
content:
The Petroleum Minister has not ruled out a potential fuel price hike.
*   This consideration stems from mounting financial losses being faced by Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs).
*   Concerns over the OMCs' deepening losses are driving the discussion for a possible price adjustment.

title: Row over Pete Davidson's 'dark humour' on Charlie Kirk: 'He constantly makes 9/11 jokes...'
content:
A "row" or controversy has emerged concerning comedian Pete Davidson's "dark humour."
*   This dispute is being highlighted or discussed in the context of Charlie Kirk.
*   A primary criticism is Davidson's alleged constant use of 9/11 jokes.

title: Trinamool’s land policy delayed West Bengal border fencing: MHA’s 2023 affidavit in Supreme Court
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) has alleged that Trinamool's land policy has delayed border fencing in West Bengal.
*   This accusation was formally made in an MHA affidavit.
*   The affidavit was submitted to the Supreme Court in 2023.
